back_translation: The Lord spoke to Moses, saying,
Speak to the sons of Israel and tell them: I am the Lord your God.

You shall not do according to the practices of the land of Egypt, where you lived, and according to the practices of the land of Canaan, where I am bringing you, you shall not do. And in their statutes you shall not walk.
My judgments you shall do, and My statutes you shall keep, to walk in them. I am the Lord your God.
And you shall keep My statutes and My judgments, which a man does and lives in them. I am the Lord.
None of you shall approach any close relative of his to uncover nakedness. I am the Lord.
You shall not expose the nakedness of your father by having sexual relations with your mother. She is your mother; you shall not have sexual relations with her.
You shall not have sexual relations with your father's wife; it would dishonor your father.
You shall not have sexual relations with your sister, the daughter of your father or the daughter of your mother, whether she was born in the household or born elsewhere.
You shall not have sexual relations with your son's daughter or your daughter's daughter, for that would shame your family.
You shall not have sexual relations with the daughter of your father's wife, born to your father; she is your sister.
You shall not have sexual relations with your father's sister; she is your father's close relative.
You shall not have sexual relations with your mother's sister, for she is your mother's close relative.
You shall not dishonor your father's brother by approaching his wife to have sexual relations with her; she is your aunt.
You shall not have sexual relations with your daughter-in-law. She is your son's wife; you shall not have sexual relations with her.
You shall not have sexual relations with your brother's wife; it would shame your brother.

You shall not have sexual relations with both a woman and her descendants. You shall not marry her son's daughter or her daughter's daughter to have sexual relations with her. They are close relatives; it is depravity.
And you shall not take your wife's sister as a rival wife and have sexual relations with her while your wife is still alive.
You shall not approach a woman to have sexual relations with her during her menstrual period.
You shall not lie carnally with your neighbor's wife and defile yourself with her.
You shall not give any of your offspring to be offered to Molech, for you shall not profane the name of your God. I am the Lord.
You shall not lie with a man as with a woman; it is an abomination.
You shall not lie carnally with any animal, defiling yourself with it; a woman shall not stand before an animal to mate with it; it is a perversion.
Do not defile yourselves with any of these practices, for by all these the nations I am driving out before you have defiled themselves.
Even the land has become defiled, so I am punishing it for its sin, and the land vomits out its inhabitants.
But you are to keep My statutes and My judgments, and you shall not commit any of these abominations—the native-born nor the foreigner who resides among you.
For the men of the land who were before you committed all these abominations, and the land has become defiled.
So the land shall not vomit you out when you defile it, as it vomited out the nation that was before you.
For anyone who commits any of these abominations—the souls that do them shall be cut off from among their people.
You shall keep My charge, not to practice any of the abominable customs that were practiced before you, that you not defile yourselves by them. I am the Lord your God.
